definition:
συμπόσιον, -ου, τό
 (συμπίνω), [in LXX: Est.7:7 (מִשְׁתֶּה יַיִן) Est.4:17, 1Ma.16:16, 2Ma.2:27, 3Ma.4:16 3Mac 5:36 3Mac 6:33; σ. οἴνου, Sir 34:31 (31:31) Sir.35:5 (32:5), Sir.49:1 * ;] 
  1. a drinking party 
   2. By meton., of the party itself, the guests (Plut); pl., σ. σ. (colloq.; see M, Pr., 97), in parties or companies: Mrk.6:39.†
 (AS)
